title: Der Zinker
director: Karl Forest, Martin Fric, Karel Lamac
writer: Edgar Wallace, Rudolph Cartier, Egon Eis
actors: Lissy Arna, Karl Ludwig Diehl, Fritz Rasp
plot: Scotland Yard receives anonymous letters at regular intervals, which contain precise details about planned jewel thefts or wanted criminals. Inspector Elford believes that the informant is the so-called Zinker.
